value: Baystate Health partners with numerous other local employers, CBOs, funders, and educational partners through Springfield WORKS, an initiative with the Western Massachussettes Economic Development Council. The vision of Springfield WORKS is “to have thriving communities where economic opportunity, growth, and resilience are available for all,” in which any resident who wants a job can find and succeed in one, and any employer can hire and retain qualified employees who meet their needs. This cross-sector partnership aims to achieve this vision through “ongoing, collaborative work to remove systemic and racial barriers and create pathways to economic opportunity and well-being.”
